name: chain_acquisition_i_analyzed_600_verified_s
method: [ACQUISITION] I analyzed 600+ verified SaaS revenue reports. Here are the "boring" ideas quietly making $10K-$900K per month that nobo [rev: $$10]

stages.task: Scrape r/microsaas, r/SaaS, r/indiehackers for posts containing revenue figures ($X MRR, $X/mo, $X ARR). Use Reddit JSON API (no browser). Extract: title, stated revenue, SaaS category, tech stack mentions, solo vs team, niche keyword.

Score each SaaS idea on: (1) boring factor (low hype = good), (2) stated MRR reliability (verified flair, screenshots, consistent post history = higher), (3) competition density (grep COMPETITIVE_INTEL_MASTER.csv), (4) vibe-codeable in <48h, (5) fits our stack (web app, PWA, or landing+Stripe). Discount stated revenue 60%. Filter to ideas with discounted MRR >$2K and competition <5 known players.

Route qualified ideas: (a) if app_factory_priority_queue already has similar → update priority score with revenue validation, (b) if novel niche → add to ALPHA_STAGING as APP-type alpha, (c) generate 2 tweets per top-3 ideas (engagement bait: 'boring SaaS making $X/mo that nobody talks about')
